Scenario: D-060/D-127 anchor positioning but no anchor-name wired
Expected: Trigger has anchor-name and popover position-anchor
Actual: no markup sets anchor-name/position-anchor; @supports block sets anchor() with no reference and overrides the working fallback; panel loses anchoring on the browsers the fix targets
Root Cause: On anchor-supporting browsers the @supports block sets anchor() with no anchor reference, becomes auto, overriding the working left:0 fallback
Proposed Fix: Add position-anchor to .popover/.dropdown-menu and anchor-name to the popovertarget, OR guard @supports to only apply when position-anchor set; keep inset fallback

Scenario: navigation-menu.css forbids popover; showcase/registry comply?
Actual: index.html:1356,1413 and registry set popover on .navigation-menu-content, contradicting css:8-10 and D-002 Fixed verdict
Root Cause: CSS-side fix applied to comment but showcase and registry markup never updated; original top-layer-vs-absolute bug is live
Proposed Fix: Remove popover from .navigation-menu-content in index.html and registry; drive open via :focus-within/:has or JS data-open

Scenario: With popover present, position:absolute resolves against trigger?
Actual: in top layer the abs offset resolves against ICB not the item, so panel detaches
Root Cause: Same top-layer conflict as D-002
Proposed Fix: Same as MNU2-001-T1

Scenario: D-043 anchor() rules added; verify a real anchor source
Expected: Trigger sets anchor-name so anchor() resolves
Actual: no element sets anchor-name/position-anchor; popovertarget does not create implicit anchor; @supports matches, wipes fallback inset, anchor() has no target; worse than pre-fix fallback
Root Cause: Fix added anchor() consumers but never the anchor producer; relied on implicit popovertarget anchor that does not exist
Proposed Fix: Add anchor-name on trigger + position-anchor on menu, OR guard @supports and keep [data-side] inset fallback

Scenario: aria-selected correctness after switching tabs
Actual: aria-selected is static literal; clicking tab 2 leaves aria-selected true on tab 1; CSS cannot mutate attribute; AT reports wrong tab
Root Cause: D-075 fix bolted ARIA onto static markup while selection lives on the hidden radio; no JS sync
Proposed Fix: Drop aria-selected and rely on radios, or document a one-line JS sync; honest CSS-only model is a radiogroup

Scenario: D-003 handle focusable/announced
Actual: registry markup is bare div.resizable-handle — NO tabindex/role/aria; CSS focus style dead; not in index.html
Root Cause: Remediation updated tracking sheet but not the registry markup string
Proposed Fix: Set handle markup to include tabindex=0 role=separator aria-orientation aria-valuenow

Scenario: Handle occupies equal 1fr grid column not thin divider
Actual: grid-auto-columns:1fr gives handle its own 1fr track equal to panels; width:4px only sizes inner element; wide empty column; flex-shrink inert in grid
Root Cause: Grid auto-columns:1fr applied uniformly; handle never given a fixed track
Proposed Fix: Switch to flex (panels flex:1, handle flex:0 0 4px), or assign handles a max-content grid track

Scenario: role=tab on label, aria-selected hardcoded; CSS switching does not update it
Actual: aria-selected is static text and never changes because selection is the hidden radio :checked; SR announces wrong tab after switch
Root Cause: Remediation added role=tab/aria-selected to labels but live state lives on the hidden radio; no JS sync
Proposed Fix: Put role=tab+aria-selected on a focusable element tied to :checked, or drop role=tab/aria-selected and let native radios carry semantics

Scenario: @supports block but NO anchor-name on any trigger and NO position-anchor anywhere
Expected: Panel anchored under trigger in anchor-capable browsers
Actual: zero anchor-name/position-anchor in index.html and src; inside @supports inset reset to auto and anchor() has no resolvable anchor; in Chrome 125+ the menu loses fallback inset and positions at default top-layer placement; regresses D-002
Root Cause: Fix relies on implicit anchor from popovertarget which is not the wiring used and is not reliably shipped; @supports strips the working fallback
Proposed Fix: Wire anchor-name on triggers + position-anchor on panels, or keep inset fallback inside @supports

Scenario: D-027 touch popover fallback CSS exists but showcase lacks popover
Expected: Demo openable on touch via tap
Actual: CSS adds popover:popover-open rule but panel has NO popover attribute and no popovertarget; never opens on touch
Root Cause: CSS hook added but markup/registry not updated to use it
Proposed Fix: Add popover attribute to .hover-card-panel and popovertarget on the trigger in showcase + registry

Scenario: Animation claim cites interpolate-size never declared; native details hides closed content
Actual: interpolate-size never declared (only in comment); native details hides closed children so grid 0fr->1fr has no box to animate; content pops not animates
Root Cause: Grid-rows animation incompatible with native details content hiding without ::details-content override
Proposed Fix: Add interpolate-size:allow-keywords and animate ::details-content with allow-discrete, or document instant open

Scenario: role=tablist/tab placement vs focusable element
Expected: tablist contains focusable tabs; no conflicting roles
Actual: role=tab on label (not focusable; focus on radio); radios keep role=radio inside role=tablist — conflicting roving model
Root Cause: D-075 added tab roles to labels without making them focus/selection target
Proposed Fix: Keep native radiogroup semantics or move focus+roles onto one element set; do not mix radio and tab roles

Scenario: D-074 mobile sidebar reachability
Expected: CSS-only mechanism can reveal mobile nav
Actual: still gated on data-mobile-open requiring JS; showcase display:none's sidebar on mobile so no nav at all; CSS-only reveal feasible now
Root Cause: Toggle modeled as a data attribute instead of a CSS-addressable state
Proposed Fix: Add a CSS-only variant: hidden checkbox + label hamburger using :has or :target

Scenario: D-022 role=grid but no role=row and gridcell only on 2 of 33 cells
Actual: grid has NO role=row wrappers; only today/selected get role=gridcell; ~40 day buttons role-less; invalid ARIA grid
Root Cause: Remediation added role=grid + a couple gridcell roles without the row layer or per-cell roles
Proposed Fix: Drop role=grid OR wrap each week in role=row and give every .calendar-day role=gridcell

Scenario: carousel dots use role=tablist with non-tab children
Actual: carousel-dots role=tablist but child buttons have aria-current and NO role=tab/aria-selected; invalid ARIA composite
Root Cause: Remediation added role=tablist on dots container without role=tab on children
Proposed Fix: Drop role=tablist (plain group) OR add role=tab + aria-selected to each dot

Scenario: Fresh clone (no build) opens showcase
Expected: Showcase styled or build instructions surfaced
Actual: copy gitignored AND not tracked; apps/www build script is a no-op echo; clone+open yields unstyled page; index links ./shadcss.min.css which does not exist until root build runs
Root Cause: Generated copy is correctly gitignored but no build runs on showcase startup and README never states the showcase depends on running build first
Proposed Fix: Make apps/www dev/build run npm run build -w packages/shadcss first, or document run build before opening showcase

Scenario: tabpanel no aria-labelledby and tabs no aria-controls
Expected: each tabpanel references its tab and vice-versa
Actual: No aria-controls on tabs, no aria-labelledby on panels; association missing
Root Cause: Roles added without the required relationship attributes
Proposed Fix: Add aria-controls on each tab label and aria-labelledby on each panel

Scenario: carousel-dots role=tablist but children lack role=tab
Actual: role=tablist with non-tab button children is owned-role mismatch; aria-current=true on a dot is wrong pattern
Root Cause: Remediation slapped role=tablist on the dots container without role=tab on children
Proposed Fix: Add role=tab + aria-selected to each dot, or drop role=tablist and use a plain group with aria-label

Scenario: role=grid contains columnheaders/buttons directly, no role=row; gridcell on 2 of 35
Expected: every day cell is a gridcell within a row
Actual: No role=row anywhere; gridcell only on today/selected leaving 33 plain buttons; malformed grid pattern
Root Cause: Partial ARIA remediation added roles only to special-state cells
Proposed Fix: Add role=row wrappers, give every .calendar-day role=gridcell, use aria-selected for the chosen day

Scenario: role=tablist contains focusable radios without tab role
Actual: puts radio inputs directly inside div.tabs-list role=tablist alongside the role=tab label; tablist containing a non-tab focusable radio is an ARIA violation
Root Cause: CSS pattern requires the radio as sibling of label; ARIA role layered on without hiding the radios
Proposed Fix: Visually-hide radios out of a11y tree; or document role=tab/tablist as decorative and rely on native radio semantics

Scenario: @supports uses anchor() without setting position-anchor
Expected: menu anchors to trigger when supported
Actual: sets top:anchor(bottom)/inset-inline-start:anchor(start) but never sets position-anchor; popovertarget does NOT establish an implicit anchor; anchor() is invalid-at-computed-value and ignored, leaving inset:auto and collapsing positioning; comment admits author must set it
Root Cause: Assumed popovertarget creates an implicit anchor; it does not
Proposed Fix: Emit anchor-name on trigger + position-anchor on .dropdown-menu, or document exact author attributes; otherwise @supports branch is worse than fallback

Scenario: package.json description still claims absolutist 'zero JavaScript'
Actual: package.json:4 says 'zero JavaScript' while READMEs softened; npm-published description retains absolutist claim contradicted by dialog/popover triggers
Root Cause: de-fraud pass edited markdown but missed package.json description and registry.json:5
Proposed Fix: Change description to 'shadcn's beauty, no JS framework' in package.json:4 and registry.json:5

Scenario: D-016 strict sibling order documented
Expected: registry/header notes input must immediately precede its label
Actual: registry markup models order but no explicit 'order is mandatory' note; comment only says 'we style the label'
Root Cause: Fix added correct markup example but omitted the explicit mandatory-order documentation
Proposed Fix: Add a NOTE in registry toggle-group entry and header comment that each input must be the immediately-preceding sibling of its label

Scenario: outline variant combined with vertical orientation (3+ items)
Expected: vertical outline collapses top/bottom borders and squares inner corners
Actual: No vertical+outline handling; doubled horizontal borders, no top/bottom collapse, rounded inner corners
Root Cause: Outline variant authored for horizontal layout only; vertical+outline never covered
Proposed Fix: Add toggle-group vertical+outline border-collapse rules or document unsupported

Scenario: D-091 outline middle-item inner-corner squaring for 3+ items
Expected: middle items square inner corners and collapse adjacent border
Actual: No :not(:first-child):not(:last-child){border-radius:0} reset; 3+ outline items show rounded inner corners
Root Cause: D-091 remediation applied to btn-group only; toggle-group outline middle-corner reset omitted
Proposed Fix: Add toggle-group outline middle-item border-radius:0 reset

Scenario: 'Search with trailing icon' demo svg lacks .icon-trailing
Expected: Trailing icon at end; input pads end not start
Actual: svg at 365 has no .icon-trailing so leading padding applied and svg at start; trailing demo renders as leading icon
Root Cause: Demo author forgot class=icon-trailing; trailing path never exercised
Proposed Fix: Add class=icon-trailing to svg at 365 and class=input-trailing to the input at 366

Scenario: Disabled textarea hover border
Expected: Disabled should not change border on hover
Actual: hover rule is :hover:not(:focus) only — missing :not(:disabled); disabled brightens on hover
Root Cause: Hover guard inconsistent; :disabled not excluded
Proposed Fix: Change to .textarea:hover:not(:focus, :disabled)

Scenario: Textarea has no :focus invalid box-shadow pair
Expected: Invalid focused textarea shows destructive ring for parity
Actual: only border-color for invalid; no destructive box-shadow on focus
Root Cause: Destructive focus-ring rule omitted from textarea
Proposed Fix: Add textarea invalid focus destructive box-shadow rule

Scenario: select:invalid hides description but field-error may be empty
Expected: an error message exists to show
Actual: hides description and shows field-error for select:invalid; selects with no field-error hide description with no replacement
Root Cause: description-hide unconditional on invalid even when no error node exists
Proposed Fix: Only hide description when a sibling .field-error exists, or ship a .field-error per required field

Scenario: Focus ring on mouse click (uses :focus not :focus-visible)
Actual: uses .select:focus; checkbox/radio use :focus-visible — inconsistent, ring on click
Root Cause: :focus chosen but inconsistent vs siblings
Proposed Fix: Change .select:focus to .select:focus-visible

Scenario: radio-group item radios lack .radio class
Actual: bare radios with NO .radio; radio dot is browser-default not styled
Root Cause: radio-group markup never adds class=radio to inner input
Proposed Fix: Add class=radio to inner radios in registry markup and showcase

Scenario: D-093 showcase switches lack role=switch
Actual: class=switch with NO role=switch; announced as checkbox
Root Cause: Fix documented in CSS comment but never applied to showcase markup
Proposed Fix: Add role=switch aria-checked to demo .switch inputs in index.html

Scenario: D-097 per-input aria-label and separator aria-hidden
Actual: first four labelled; separator aria-hidden; digits 5-8 have NO aria-label
Root Cause: Fix applied to first group only; second group unlabelled
Proposed Fix: Add aria-label Digit 5..8 to 380-383

Scenario: Eager :invalid vs input.css :user-invalid
Actual: bare .otp-input:invalid with no guard; prefilled invalid shows red on load
Root Cause: iter-1 upgraded input/textarea but missed input-otp.css
Proposed Fix: Change .otp-input:invalid to .otp-input:user-invalid

Scenario: Interactive card focus dead without focusability
Actual: card-interactive div has no tabindex/role; focus-visible never triggers
Root Cause: CSS fix added but canonical usage markup not focusable
Proposed Fix: Add tabindex=0 (and role/link) to interactive card in showcase + registry

Scenario: D-127 reconcile popover data-side vocab
Actual: registry.json:259 still top|start|end only; css defines bottom-start/bottom-end; showcase uses bottom-start; dialog entry updated but popover not
Root Cause: Remediation updated dropdown/dialog registry entries but missed popover entry
Proposed Fix: Update registry.json:259 popover attributes to include bottom-start|bottom-end

Scenario: sheet-body/drawer-body flex:1 but container is not flex column
Actual: dialog.sheet/drawer have NO display:flex; flex:1 on body is inert; footer does not pin to bottom on short content
Root Cause: Container never made a flex column; flex:1 copied from a flex-column assumption
Proposed Fix: Add display:flex;flex-direction:column to dialog.sheet and dialog.drawer base rules

Scenario: menubar try-fallbacks coverage
Actual: only on base .menubar-menu; data-side variants omit it so explicit-side menus do not flip
Root Cause: try-fallbacks added only to the default rule
Proposed Fix: Add position-try-fallbacks to each [data-side] variant

Scenario: D-047 context-menu checkbox items lack role/aria-checked
Actual: css styles [data-checked] only; no ARIA; static role authoring is possible without JS so waiver over-broad
Root Cause: Waiver conflated dynamic state toggling (JS) with static role/aria authoring
Proposed Fix: Author role=menuitemcheckbox + aria-checked mirroring data-checked in registry; live toggling needs JS

Scenario: RTL: start/end logical inset but physical translateX
Expected: body and arrow stay same logical side; reveal consistent
Actual: body positioned with inset-inline (flips) but reveal uses physical translateX which does NOT flip; RTL slide-in inverted
Root Cause: Mixed logical positioning with physical transform axis
Proposed Fix: Use a logical offset or :dir(rtl) overrides to flip translateX sign

Scenario: ARIA relationship trigger<->panel
Actual: trigger and panel have no id/aria-describedby; comment says wire it but showcase doesn't
Root Cause: Doc-only guidance not reflected in demo
Proposed Fix: Add id to panel and aria-describedby on trigger in showcase

Scenario: Same grid-animation-on-native-details limitation as accordion
Actual: identical grid 0fr->1fr gated by native [open]; native details hides closed content so reveal pops
Root Cause: Grid-rows transition needs ::details-content handling
Proposed Fix: Add interpolate-size + ::details-content allow-discrete, or document instant reveal

Scenario: pointer-events:none active link still keyboard-focusable; ul lacks role=list
Actual: pointer-events only blocks pointer; keyboard Enter follows href; active item tab-focusable; list-style:none can drop list semantics
Root Cause: pointer-events is mouse-only guard; current page still a live anchor
Proposed Fix: Render current page as a non-anchor span (or tabindex=-1) and add role=list to .pagination

Scenario: D-055 collapse-to-icon toggle
Actual: collapse purely attribute-driven; a :has(:checked) toggle would achieve it without JS
Root Cause: Stateful collapse modeled via data attribute rather than :has()/sibling :checked
Proposed Fix: Offer an optional CSS-only collapse via hidden checkbox + :has reusing collapsed rules

Scenario: Header cells lack scope attribute
Actual: th have no scope= (count=0); native inference unreliable
Root Cause: Showcase markup omitted scope; CSS cannot add it
Proposed Fix: Add scope=col to each thead th in showcase/registry

Scenario: D-024 removed unfulfilled <datalist> reference
Expected: header no longer promises a datalist example
Actual: command.css:5-6 STILL claims a <datalist> pattern but no datalist exists in css or showcase
Root Cause: Comment edited only in showcase copy, not in component file header
Proposed Fix: Remove the <datalist> clause from command.css:5-6 or ship the datalist pattern

Scenario: Showcase #toast renders .toast and prose matches token
Actual: #toast renders ONLY .sonner (0 class=toast); prose says --sonner-duration not defined in toast.css; component documented but never demoed; prose cites foreign token
Root Cause: Section authored around sonner only; copy not reconciled with separate toast.css component
Proposed Fix: Add a real .toast demo or rename prose to reference --sonner-duration accurately

Scenario: role=status placement registry vs showcase
Actual: registry sets role=status on each .sonner; showcase sets it on .sonner-region only; surfaces disagree
Root Cause: ARIA enrichment applied to registry markup but showcase not aligned
Proposed Fix: Align showcase to registry: aria-live on region, role=status on each .sonner

Scenario: Empty icon svg decorative; container role
Expected: showcase icon svg aria-hidden; role for container
Actual: empty-icon svg has NO aria-hidden so SR reads raw path; .empty plain div no role=status/region
Root Cause: ARIA enrichment pass did not reach the empty showcase block
Proposed Fix: Add aria-hidden=true to .empty-icon svg in showcase + registry; optionally role=status on .empty

Scenario: apps/www dir absent when build runs
Expected: Build degrades gracefully or ensures dir
Actual: build ensureDir's only distDir; www copy write has no ensureDir; if apps/www absent the build throws ENOENT and exits non-zero
Root Cause: Package build coupled to sibling app path with no existence guard
Proposed Fix: Wrap the www copy in try/catch or check existsSync before writing so package build never fails on the showcase path

Scenario: Direct npm publish bypasses build
Actual: no prepublishOnly/prepack/prepare hook; only root release chains build+publish; direct npm publish -w would publish on-disk dist (potentially stale)
Root Cause: Build-before-publish guarantee lives only in the convenience script, not a lifecycle hook
Proposed Fix: Add prepublishOnly: npm run build (or prepack) to packages/shadcss scripts

Scenario: D-055/D-056/D-070/D-074 'needs JS' toggles
Expected: Confirm whether CSS-only can drive collapse/drawer/overlay open
Actual: these waivers' own proposed fixes note a CSS-only checkbox/:has()/:target toggle is feasible; the JS-only framing is not a hard limit; ARIA-semantics waivers remain genuine
Root Cause: Interaction-visibility waivers conflated with genuinely-unfixable ARIA-role waivers; CSS :has()/:target now covers visibility toggles
Proposed Fix: Re-open D-055/D-056/D-070/D-074 with a CSS-only hidden-checkbox or :target toggle; keep ARIA-role waivers WAIVED

Scenario: selected day uses aria-pressed=true
Actual: aria-pressed models a toggle button not a selected grid cell; semantically wrong
Root Cause: Confused toggle vs grid selection semantics
Proposed Fix: Use aria-selected=true on the chosen day

Scenario: first 4 inputs labelled, last 4 after separator have none
Actual: inputs 380-383 have no aria-label; SR announces unlabelled edit fields
Root Cause: Remediation labelled only the first group
Proposed Fix: Add aria-label Digit 5..8 to the trailing inputs

Scenario: Docs show @import bare specifier but plain CSS has no Node resolution
Expected: documented import resolves in a typical CSS pipeline
Actual: raw CSS @import of a bare package specifier is not resolvable by plain CSS; only works through a bundler honoring exports/style; plain @import 404s; docs don't state bundler required
Root Cause: Install doc assumes bundler resolution without saying so
Proposed Fix: Clarify the @import requires a bundler, or show explicit path @russfranky/shadcss/dist/shadcss.min.css

Scenario: context-menu registry markup quality
Actual: markup is empty stub div.context-menu popover role=menu with no menuitem children or aria; incomplete guidance
Root Cause: placeholder markup never fleshed out for context-menu
Proposed Fix: Mirror dropdown markup: include role=menuitem buttons and oncontextmenu trigger note

Scenario: aria-selected and tab/panel linkage
Expected: aria-controls / aria-labelledby connect tab and panel
Actual: label has role=tab aria-selected=true but no aria-controls; panel has role=tabpanel data-tab but no aria-labelledby; linkage missing
Root Cause: partial ARIA added without relationship attributes
Proposed Fix: Add aria-controls on tab labels and aria-labelledby on panels

Scenario: select:invalid fires on initial load (no interaction gate)
Actual: rule .field:has(select:invalid) .field-error{display:flex} has NO :user-invalid or interaction gate; a required select with no valid option is :invalid on load so error shows immediately; over-broad
Root Cause: select has no :placeholder-shown equivalent so a bare select:invalid branch was added, losing the interaction gate
Proposed Fix: Use .field:has(select:user-invalid) for the select branch, dropping the ungated select:invalid

Scenario: registry.json:5 description mirrors absolutist claim
Actual: registry.json:5 also says 'zero JavaScript'; same inconsistency
Root Cause: shared boilerplate string not updated
Proposed Fix: Align to 'no JS framework' wording

Scenario: CDN unpkg snippet is unpinned
Expected: production CDN URL pins a version
Actual: all CDN snippets unpinned (no @0.1.0); resolves to latest; future major can silently break consumers
Root Cause: convenience over stability; version pin omitted
Proposed Fix: Pin to @russfranky/shadcss@0.1.0 in documented CDN URLs or note pin a version in production
